title: Dataset of human EDEM2 melanoma cells proteomics, affinity proteomics and deglycoproteomics.
author: Chiritoiu GN Chiritoiu M Munteanu CVA
content: S-EPMC8529096 PMC8529096 Dataset of human EDEM2 melanoma cells proteomics, affinity proteomics and deglycoproteomics. EDEM2 (Endoplasmic reticulum Degradation-Enhancing alpha-Mannosidase-like protein 2) is one of the key-proteins suggested to be involved in the selection and degradation
